description: These Cosy Boys Socks are available in sizes 9-12, 12.5-3.5, 4-6 in range of designs and colours. Each pack includes one fluffy pair and one pair with popcorn texture. Featuring an elasticated top band and grippy sole (on the fluffy socks only). These are made from 98% Polyester 2% Elastane, what makes them super soft, cosy, warm and insulating, lightweight, highly durable and easy to care for. Perfect for snuggling up in the cooler evenings and wearing in the morning with a cup of hot chocolate. Keep your little feet cosy!
